creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 221259
patch to update the port

- Update 0.01 -> 0.04
Changes: https://metacpan.org/changes/distribution/Crypt-X509-CRL
- return WRKSRC to default value

- "portlint -AC" gives non-relevant warns.
- Tested with:
12.2-RELEASE-p2
pkg 1.16.1
poudriere 3.3.6
perl 5.32.0
openssl 1.1.1h
ssl=base
- built-in perl tests in a clean poudriere jail say: PASS.
